query: Our Vite React Router build is copied into /data in ghcr.io/gecut/nginx/spa:1.0.0, but refreshing /orders/42 gives a 404. Diagnose the container locations and give me a safe Compose fix plus curl checks.
Create a Kubernetes deployment for my compiled Vue SPA using the Gecut nginx SPA image. It uses /app.html as the shell and needs deep-link, missing-asset, health, and cache verification.
I'm publishing Angular under /portal/ with gecut nginx spa. Help align base href, the on-disk portal/index.html, NGINX_SPA_INDEX_URI, ingress paths, and strict asset 404s.

Audit these response headers from ghcr.io/gecut/nginx/spa: deep links are cached for an hour, errors say no-store, and CORS appears only on some URLs. Explain the inherited CDN maps and location scope.
My gecut nginx SPA pod exits with 45-validate-spa-shell.sh saying /data/index.html is unreadable. The dist volume is read-only. Find the likely mount and permissions issue.
Please add an application-specific CSP and Permissions-Policy to a downstream image based on ghcr.io/gecut/nginx/spa:1.0.0 without breaking its Cache-Control ownership.
We enabled NGINX_AUTO_WEBP and a CDN in front of our Gecut SPA container. JPEGs are intermittently wrong between browsers. Show how to verify adjacent webp files and Vary at origin and edge.
Set up canonical app.example.com redirects and global rate limiting for nginx/spa behind our private load balancer. I need exact trusted CIDR guidance and no false claim that this terminates TLS.
A route named /account.settings should open our client router, but it is 404 in the Gecut SPA image while /account/settings works. Is this expected, and what are the safe options?
Give me a release-ready Dockerfile and verification checklist for a Svelte SPA dist directory on ghcr.io/gecut/nginx/spa, including ETag, 304, service worker, shell, and missing asset behavior.
Optimize my general nginx reverse proxy for a Node API: upstream keepalive, WebSockets, TLS certificates, OCSP stapling, and proxy_cache. We do not use any Gecut container images.
Deploy a Next.js standalone server with SSR, server actions, and /api routes. It runs with node server.js and needs a Kubernetes readiness probe.
My React Router component redirects to /login in a unit test. Fix the TypeScript route guards and Vitest mocks; deployment and nginx are already working.
Configure Cloudflare cache rules, Workers, DNS, SSL mode, and WAF for example.com. The origin type has not been chosen yet.
Build an NGINX Ingress Controller annotation set to proxy a gRPC service with mTLS and cert-manager. This is not a static website.
I need a plain nginx:1.30 container to serve downloadable ISO files with byte ranges and directory listing. There is no SPA and no gecut image.
Change our Vite config so assets use /portal/ and update React Router basename. Don't touch or discuss the already-approved web server deployment.
Design a service worker caching strategy for offline use with Workbox, background sync, and precaching. Hosting headers are outside this task.
Review this raw nginx.conf for security headers and gzip. It belongs to an Ubuntu VM managed by Ansible, not the Gecut nginx SPA image.
Package a static documentation site where every route is emitted as an HTML file. We want strict file serving with no client-side fallback and are considering ghcr.io/gecut/nginx/cdn.
